basic_details.job_title: KMF GUMUL – Junior Technician, Assistant Manager and More – 55 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Kalaburagi-Bidar & Yadgir Cooperative Milk Producers Union (KMF GUMUL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 55 Junior Technician, Assistant Manager and More Posts. Candidates with B.B.A, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, BVSC, ITI, BBM, CA, M.Com Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 29-05-2026, and closes on 27-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through KMF GUMUL website, kmfnandini.coop.

qualification.education_qualification: B.B.A, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, BVSC, ITI, BBM, CA, M.Com

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process only:
